title: Training Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Training Techniques inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Hidden Markov Model
steps.summary: Hidden Markov Model belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Training Techniques. Start after Markov Model. It opens into Hidden Markov Model Generator and Hidden Markov Models (HMM).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: N-gram Model
steps.summary: N-gram Model belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with World Model Architectures and Model Versioning. It opens into Gram OOD and Skip-Gram.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Model scoring
steps.summary: Model scoring belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with World Model Architectures and N-gram Model. It opens into Inverse Propensity Scoring and Antecedent Scoring.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Model lineage
steps.summary: Model lineage belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Training Techniques. Compare it with World Model Architectures and N-gram Model. It opens into Feature lineage and Marquez lineage.
